entities.description: rag approaches are methods proven to excel in tasks like question answering and data cleaning

sql rewrite is a task where rag approaches have been proven to excel
data cleaning is a task where rag approaches have been proven to excel
the naive rag technique relies on retrieving query relevant contexts from external knowledge bases to mitigate hallucination
llms are large language models whose hallucination is mitigated by the naive rag technique
graph structures are adopted by many rag approaches to organize information and relationships within documents
the agentic rag paradigm employs autonomous agents to dynamically orchestrate and refine the rag pipeline
autonomous agents are employed by the agentic rag paradigm to orchestrate and refine the pipeline
the rag pipeline is the process dynamically orchestrated and refined by the agentic rag paradigm

reasoning robustness is a metric significantly boosted by the agentic rag paradigm
generation fidelity is a metric significantly boosted by the agentic rag paradigm
